name: My Vicorian Jewels (Mini Fruitcakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the fruits and raisins in brandy or juice overnight.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar, butter, and egg until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the dry ingredients: baking soda, salt, allspice, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the wet mixture.
5. Mix in the chopped walnuts, marinated fruits, candied cherries, and any additional garnish.
6. Spoon the batter into 1 3/4-inch mini muffin tins lined with baking cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
7. Top each muffin with a cherry or walnut garnish.
8. Bake at 300 degrees F (150 degrees C) for 30 minutes.
9. Remove from the tins and brush the tops with brandy or juice while still warm.
10. Allow to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
11. Before serving, brush the tops of the fruitcakes with jelly.
